description: implement logview for iOS, this logview same as @smartlog/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/jefryjacky/smartlog/LogActivity.kt , which will be use in the @composeApp/src/iosMain/kotlin/com/jefryjacky/smartloggingapp/MainViewController.kt to navigate, this @composeApp/src/iosMain/kotlin/com/jefryjacky/smartloggingapp/MainViewController.kt is same like @composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/jefryjacky/smartloggingapp/MainActivity.kt
